Howling Moon.name: Howling Moon
Howling Moon.description: At the start of the turn, apply Attack Up and Shield effect to the owner for 1 turn, with the shield amount equal to pet speed * 10.

Adv Poison Top.name: Adv Poison Top
Adv Poison Top.description: Deal 80% damage to a small area of enemies and apply 2 Poisoned effects for 2 turns (Poisoned effects can deal up to 20000 damage).

Advanced Slow Top.name: Advanced Slow Top
Advanced Slow Top.description: Deal 112% damage to a small area of enemies, with a 100% chance to apply a speed reduction effect for two turns.
